title: Little Brak vegetation fire extinguished
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The vegetation fire between Little Brak River and Hartenbos was extinguished by the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services last night, 4 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The vegetation fire between Little Brak River and Hartenbos was extinguished by the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services last night, 4 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The fire broke out near the railway line between the two areas on the afternoon of 3 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality stated that its firefighting crews had been battling the flames since Saturday afternoon, however, their efforts were hampered by some inaccessible terrain.","html":"The Mossel Bay Municipality stated that its firefighting crews had been battling the flames since Saturday afternoon, however, their efforts were hampered by some inaccessible terrain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Late yesterday afternoon, the crews began mopping-up operations and the perimeter around the Hartland Lifestyle Estate was secured.","html":"Late yesterday afternoon, the crews began mopping-up operations and the perimeter around the Hartland Lifestyle Estate was secured."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There are no visible flames or smoke, and the crews will remain in the area to monitor the situation and tend to any hotspots that may flare up.","html":"There are no visible flames or smoke, and the crews will remain in the area to monitor the situation and tend to any hotspots that may flare up."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article: Little Brak vegetation fire: firefighting efforts continue","html":"Previous article: Little Brak vegetation fire: firefighting efforts continue"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
